description: Home lab plant moisture monitoring — feature backlog for incremental agent work
instructions: Each feature group is scoped to fit within a single Claude Code Opus 4.6 context window. An agent should pick ONE group, implement all features in it, commit progress, and update this file by setting passes=true on completed features. Do NOT remove or edit feature descriptions — only change the passes field. Follow the existing design system (Greenhouse Control Room dark theme, see frontend/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md). Backend changes need corresponding frontend UI. Test that the app builds (pnpm build) before marking done.

feature_groups.name: Watering Log & Plant Notes
feature_groups.description: Let users record when they watered a plant, attach notes, and optionally auto-detect watering events from sharp moisture increases. This is the most requested home-user feature — the system tracks moisture but has no way to log human actions.
feature_groups.scope: Backend model + CRUD + API routes, frontend UI on PlantDetail page + new log page

features.description: Add WateringLog model (id, sensor_id FK, timestamp, notes, method enum [manual/auto/rain]). Add to models.py, create schema in schemas.py.
CRUD operations: create_watering_log, get_watering_logs_by_sensor (with pagination + date range filter), delete_watering_log. Add to crud.py.
POST /watering-logs, GET /watering-logs (filter by sensor_id, date range), DELETE /watering-logs/{id}. New router file routers/watering_logs.py, mount in main.py.
Add 'Log Watering' button on PlantDetail page. Quick-add modal with optional notes field and method selector. Show watering history timeline below readings graph.
Show 'last watered X days ago' on PlantCard component. Add days_since_watered to dashboard summary API if a watering log exists for that sensor.

Auto-detect watering events from moisture data. Add per-sensor toggle (auto_log_watering bool on Sensor model, default False). Backend: in crud.create_reading(), when enabled, compare new moisture to the previous reading — if moisture jumps up by more than a configurable threshold (e.g. 15% within one reading interval), automatically create a WateringLog entry with method='auto' and a note like 'Auto-detected: moisture rose from 32% to 68%'. Add moisture_jump_threshold field to SystemConfig (default 15). Frontend: toggle on PlantDetail sensor info section, sensitivity slider on Settings page.
Add a notes text field to the Sensor model (nullable string). API: include in sensor update endpoint. UI: editable notes area on PlantDetail page below sensor info.

feature_groups.name: Push Notifications via ntfy.sh
feature_groups.description: Integrate with ntfy.sh (self-hostable push notification service, perfect for homelab). Send alerts to phone when plants need water instead of requiring dashboard checks.
feature_groups.scope: Backend notification service + config, frontend settings UI

features.description: Add notification fields to SystemConfig model: ntfy_enabled (bool, default False), ntfy_server_url (str, default 'https://ntfy.sh'), ntfy_topic (str). Update schemas and config router.
Create services/notifications.py with send_ntfy_notification(title, message, priority, tags). Use httpx or requests to POST to ntfy server. Priority mapping: dry=urgent, wet=default.
Hook into alert creation in crud.py — when a new alert is created AND ntfy is enabled, fire notification with plant name, moisture %, and threshold info. Include link to dashboard.

Add Notifications section to Settings page. Fields: enable/disable toggle, server URL input, topic input. 'Send Test' button that triggers a test notification via new API endpoint POST /config/test-notification.
Add a periodic check (or on heartbeat miss) that sends notification when a device goes offline (last_seen exceeds device_timeout). Avoid spamming — only notify once per offline event.

feature_groups.name: Historical Data & Insights
feature_groups.description: Add aggregated views and analysis of moisture data over time. Help users understand watering patterns and plant health trends.
feature_groups.scope: Backend aggregation endpoints, frontend charts and summary views

features.description: New endpoint GET /readings/sensor/{sensor_id}/aggregated?period=daily|weekly (returns avg, min, max moisture per period). Use SQLite date functions for grouping.

New endpoint GET /readings/sensor/{sensor_id}/drying-rate. Calculate average moisture drop per hour over the last 7 days (excluding periods after watering events if watering log exists). Return rate + estimated days until dry threshold.
Add time range selector to SensorReadingsGraph component: 24h, 7d, 30d, All. Currently shows all readings which gets dense. Use aggregated endpoint for 30d+ views.
Add insights card on PlantDetail page showing: average moisture (7d), drying rate (% per day), estimated days until needs water, total watering events this month.
Add 'Export CSV' button on Readings page. Backend endpoint GET /readings/export?sensor_id=X&start=&end= returns CSV file download with timestamp, moisture, raw_adc columns.

feature_groups.name: Dashboard Quality-of-Life
feature_groups.description: Improve the main dashboard experience for daily home use — make it the one-glance view for plant health.
feature_groups.scope: Frontend dashboard and component changes, minor backend additions

features.description: Add sort options to dashboard: by moisture level (driest first), by name, by zone. Add filter: show all / needs water only / healthy only. Persist selection in localStorage.
If watering log feature exists, show 'Watered 3d ago' on PlantCard. If no watering log, show nothing (don't show 'Never' — that's noise).

Optional weather widget in dashboard header. Use Open-Meteo free API (no key needed) with lat/lon from Settings. Show current temp and humidity — relevant context for plant care. If no location configured, hide widget entirely.
Add kiosk mode toggle (button in navbar). Hides sidebar and navbar, shows just plant cards in a large grid. Auto-cycles through zones every 30s. Good for a wall-mounted tablet display.
Add quick action buttons on PlantCard hover/tap: 'Log Watering' (if watering log feature exists), 'Set Threshold', 'View History'. Reduces clicks to common actions.

feature_groups.name: Mobile Experience
feature_groups.description: Make the dashboard usable on a phone. Currently functional but not optimized for mobile — sidebar takes too much space, tap targets are small.

features.description: Collapsible sidebar on mobile (<768px): hamburger button in navbar, slide-in overlay with backdrop. Auto-close on route change. Currently sidebar is always visible at 240px.
Stack PlantCards single-column on mobile with larger tap targets. Show moisture bar more prominently. Ensure sparkline is readable at mobile widths.
Add bottom navigation bar on mobile (Dashboard, Alerts, Settings) — common mobile pattern. Hide sidebar completely on mobile in favor of bottom nav.
Add PWA manifest.json and service worker registration so the app can be 'installed' on phone home screen. App icon, splash screen, standalone display mode. Offline page showing last cached data.

feature_groups.name: Database Backup & Maintenance
feature_groups.description: SQLite database management for a home server that should just keep running without manual intervention.
feature_groups.scope: Backend endpoints and scheduled tasks, frontend settings UI

features.description: Add GET /admin/backup endpoint that returns the SQLite database file as a download. Use SQLite online backup API (connection.backup()) for a safe copy while DB is in use.
Add 'Download Backup' button to Settings page under Data Maintenance section. Shows database size and last backup time.
Add retention_days field to SystemConfig (default 90). Show in Settings with explanation. Backend: add startup task or periodic check that calls delete_old_readings automatically.
Add GET /admin/stats endpoint: total readings count, database file size, oldest reading date, readings per day average. Show on Settings page as 'Database Health' section.

feature_groups.name: Sensor & Device Diagnostics
feature_groups.description: Help troubleshoot hardware issues — when a sensor stops reporting or gives weird values, make it easy to figure out why.
feature_groups.scope: Backend diagnostic endpoints, frontend device detail improvements

features.description: Add a Device Detail page (route: /devices/:deviceId). Show: device info (IP, MAC, firmware, last seen), list of sensors on this device with current readings, uptime tracking, recent heartbeat history.
Add HeartbeatLog model (device_id, timestamp, ip_address, firmware_version). Log each heartbeat. New endpoint GET /devices/{device_id}/heartbeats (last 50). Helps diagnose connectivity issues.

On Sensors page, show health indicators: reading frequency (is it reporting at expected interval?), ADC range check (stuck at 0 or 4095 = broken sensor), last N readings variance (flatline = suspicious).
Add 'Debug' toggle on PlantDetail page that shows raw ADC values alongside moisture %, calibration bounds as reference lines on the graph, and a table of recent raw values. Helps with calibration.

feature_groups.name: Environment & Configuration Cleanup
feature_groups.description: Move hardcoded values to environment variables and make the system easier to configure on first setup.
feature_groups.scope: Backend .env support, frontend env vars, documentation

features.description: Create .env.example with DATABASE_URL, HOST, PORT, CORS_ORIGINS. Load in database.py and main.py via python-dotenv (already in requirements). Replace hardcoded values.
Replace hardcoded 'http://localhost:8000' in api.ts with import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL. Add .env.example with VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:8000. Document in CLAUDE.md.
Read CORS_ORIGINS from .env (comma-separated). Default to '*' for backwards compatibility. Allows restricting access when desired.

Add docker-compose.yml that runs backend + frontend together. Backend: Python image, mount backend/, expose 8000. Frontend: Node image, build + serve static, expose 80. Shared .env file. Makes deployment on homelab trivial.

feature_groups.name: Multi-Plant Comparison & Visualization
feature_groups.description: Compare moisture trends across multiple plants on one chart. Useful for understanding which plants dry out faster and optimizing watering schedules.
feature_groups.scope: Backend multi-sensor query endpoint, frontend comparison page

features.description: New endpoint GET /readings/compare?sensor_ids=1,2,3&hours=168 returns time-aligned readings for multiple sensors. Aggregate to hourly if >24h range to keep response size reasonable.
New 'Compare' page (add to sidebar under Dashboard). Multi-select sensors (checkboxes), time range picker, overlaid Recharts LineChart with color-coded lines per sensor. Legend with sensor names.
On dashboard, add expandable zone-level chart showing average moisture across all sensors in that zone over time. Quick visual for 'is this room getting enough water overall?'

feature_groups.name: Light/Dark Mode Toggle
feature_groups.description: Add a light mode alternative to the dark Greenhouse theme. Some users prefer light mode, especially on phones in bright environments.
feature_groups.scope: Frontend CSS variables, theme context, settings toggle

features.description: Refactor index.css to use CSS custom properties for all colors (--canvas-base, --surface-base, --text-primary, etc). Define :root (dark) and .light-theme class with light equivalents. Update all Tailwind config references.
Create ThemeContext with useTheme hook. Stores preference in localStorage. Applies .light-theme class to document root. Defaults to dark (matching current design).
Add sun/moon toggle button in navbar next to alert bell. Smooth transition between themes (CSS transition on background-color, color).
